items.name: Brentwood Chinese Chicken Salad
items.description:
Our take on the not-so-traditional classic: hand-pulled organic chicken, bok choy, snowpeas, green onion, cabbage, avocado, sesame seed, watermelon radish, cilantro, and a side of grain-free “wontons,” toasted quinoa, roasted almonds, and a side of carrot-ginger vinaigrette. 

Gluten-free and dairy-free, choose no chicken to make it plant based

items.name: G-Potle Taco Crunch Bowl
items.description:
We gave the typical taco bowl a makeover. Little gem lettuce, chipotle marinated chicken, adobo black beans, avocado, pico de gallo, quickly pickled red cabbage and cilantro, Hook's 2 year aged white cheddar cheese, topped with crispy rice and casavva flour tortilla crunchies, and served with a side of creamy salsa verde.

gluten-free, choose mushroom carnitas and no cheese to make it vegan

items.name: Huberman's Organic Turkey Chili
items.description:
Dr. Huberman developed, taste-tested, and approved the ultimate protein-packed meal: a nutrient-dense chili made with organic turkey, fiber-rich kidney beans, and a blend of five chiles. Build your perfect bowl by mixing and matching six garnishes, Japanese sweet potato, pickled cabbage, lime crema, Hook’s 2-year aged cheddar, pickled jalapeños, and fresh cilantro.

gluten-free

gluten-free, remove salami to make it vegetarian

Griddle-cooked until golden and crisp, it's hearty, wholesome, and packed with protein. Served with a side of cool cucumber, onion and tomato raita and spicy pickle, for the perfect bite every time.

items.name: 30 Traditional Wings
items.description:
Get ready to spice up your event with our 30-piece wings combo! Each wing is cooked to perfection—crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside. 

Choose from your favorite flavors: Classic Buffalo, Spicy Nashville, or our Signature House Sauce. Perfect for parties, office lunches, or any gathering where flavor takes center stage. 

Add fries or fresh salad on the side to make it a full meal that everyone will love!

items.name: (V) Organic Tofu 50-50 Bowl
items.description:
Balanced vegan option. Heft from purple rice, lightness from mixed greens, served with organic tofu, cucumbers, shredded carrots, seasonal snow or snap peas, fresh pear slices, cashews, and fresh cilantro and scallion. Finished with your choice of Lotus & Lime signature sauce — bright Ginger Lime, rich "Peanut" Sauce (nut-free, made with roasted sunflower), or savory Tamarind Garlic.

Everything is gluten, dairy free, and peanut free including all sauces. Remove cashews to make it nut free.

items.name: Almojabana - Frozen dough
items.description:
This presentation allows you to have the Almojabana fresh out of the oven, so you can bake it at your convenience.

The Colombian almojábana is a soft, fluffy cheese roll with a delicate balance of sweet and savory flavors and a lightly browned crust.

✨ Certified gluten-free. No additives 

Contains eggs and milk

items.name: Almojabana Filled Guava 3 Pack - Almojabana  guayaba
items.description:
Three fresh-baked Colombian cheese breads filled with sweet guava paste. Soft, slightly chewy, and naturally gluten-free.


Tres panes de queso colombianos recién horneados, rellenos con pasta dulce de guayaba. Suaves, ligeramente esponjosos por dentro y dorados por fuera. items.name: Colombiana
items.description:
Colombiana is a classic Colombian soda. It has a sweet, smooth, and slightly fruity flavor with a hint of caramel and kola. Its bright orange-red color matches its vibrant taste, which is often described as a mix between cream soda and champagne cola.

It’s refreshing and light, not overly carbonated, making it the perfect pairing for cheese breads and buñuelos.

👉 Every sip of Colombiana feels like a taste of Colombian tradition — nostalgic, joyful, and unique. 🇨🇴✨

items.name: Smash birria taco
items.description:
Smash Birria Taco – Exclusivo de Mil Delicias
Our signature innovation! A single street-style corn tortilla smashed flat and filled with slow-cooked juicy shredded birria beef and melted cheese. The tortilla is cooked until slightly crispy on the edges. Served with steaming hot slow-cooked birria consomé for dipping, topped with fresh onions, cilantro, and jalapeños. A modern twist on an authentic classic - taste the difference slow-cooking makes!Nuestra versión única del famoso smash taco: birria jugosa y bien dorada en la plancha, queso derretido, tortilla hecha a mano, guacamole fresco, pico de gallo y nuestra salsa roja especial.
¡Una explosión de sabor en cada mordida!
Acompañado de chips artesanales.

¡Solo en Mil Delicias – Sabor casero con estilo callejero!
